product: Databricks Excel Add-in requires workspace preview enablement
tagline: To use the Databricks Excel Add in, a workspace admin must now enable the Excel Connector preview from the Previews page.
what_it_does: To use the Databricks Excel Add in, a workspace admin must now enable the Excel Connector preview from the Previews page. This page tells you how to manage Databricks previews in your account or workspace. Databricks previews overview Previews provide early access to Databricks features before they are released for General Availability (GA).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: To use the Databricks Excel Add in, a workspace admin must now enable the Excel Connector preview from the Previews page.
